name: Apple Bagel Broil
recipeIngredient: 1 cinnamon raisin bagel (or your choice), split
recipeInstructions:
1. Lightly toast the bagel and spread with butter or margarine while still hot.
2. Top each bagel with apple slices.
3. Sprinkle with cinnamon sugar if using.
4. Place cheese slices on each bagel.
5. Broil until cheese is bubbly.
6. Makes 2 half bagels.
